DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO SECOND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS TO DEFENDANT PAUL REVERE LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO NO. 18 AS THE OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED. THE COURT DOES NOT FIND THAT ADDITIONAL DOCUMENTS EXIST, BUT DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO VERIFY THAT NO FURTHER DOCUMENTS EXIST. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO NOS. 21-34. THE OBJECTIONS TO THE YEARS FOR WHICH THE REQUESTS ARE MADE ARE OVERRULED. THE CONFIDENTIALITY AND PROPRIETARY OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO VERIFY THE SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSE. THE RESPONSE PROPERLY LIMITS THE PRODUCTION TO DOCUMENTS USED TO DETERMINE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS, THEREBY EXCLUDING HEALTH UNDERWRITING MANUALS. DEFENDANT IS NOT REQUIRED TO PRODUCE THE COMPLETE MANUALS AND GUIDELINES AS THEY ARE NOT RELEVANT EXCEPT AS THEY MAY HAVE BEEN USED TO DETERMINE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO NO. 35 AS IT SEEKS A VERIFICATION. FURTHER RESPONSES, PRODUCTION, AND VERIFICATIONS SHALL BE MADE WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. COMM: EVERETT HEWLETT
